accommodations.text: Read test directions and math word problems aloud on request.
accommodations.source_quote: Read test directions and math word problems aloud on request.

accommodations.text: Pair auditory alerts and directions with a visual cue.
accommodations.source_quote: Pair auditory alerts and directions with a visual cue.

accommodations.text: Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.
accommodations.source_quote: Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.

accommodations.text: Seat with a clear line of sight to the face of the speaker.
accommodations.source_quote: Seat with a clear line of sight to the face of the speaker.

services.source_quote: Speech and language therapy: 60 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Speech-language pathologist.

goals.text: Noah will use a self-monitoring checklist to review work before submitting in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Reviews work before submitting in 1 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: Noah will use a self-monitoring checklist to review work before submitting in 4 of 5 samples.

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.

goals.text: Diego will solve two-step equations with 80% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.
goals.source_quote: Diego will solve two-step equations with 80% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.

goals.text: Marcus will use a taught script to join a peer activity in 3 of 4 structured opportunities.
goals.baseline: Joins a peer activity with adult prompting in 1 of 4 opportunities.

goals.text: Priya will use correct past-tense verbs in structured sentences with 80% accuracy.
